_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: Further analysis to determine the mean fluorescent intensity revealed a significant increase in ROS levels in S462TY, STS26T, and T265 cells
details: Significant increase in ROS levels after 24h treatment with 10 μM FT895
